# Refactoring keywords for commit pre-filtering
# One keyword per line, case-insensitive matching
# Lines starting with # are comments

# General refactoring terms
refactor
cleanup
clean up
modernize
simplif
migrate

# Deprecation-related
deprecat
replace
remove.*deprecated
use.*instead
switch.*to
update.*api

# Java language features
lambda
stream
foreach
var 
pattern matching
instanceof
text block
record
sealed
switch expression

# Encoding / IO
encoding
charset
nio
try-with-resource
StandardCharsets

# Collections
Collections.unmodifiable
List.of
List.copyOf
Map.of
Set.of

# Eclipse-specific
IStatus
Status.error
Status.warning
SubMonitor
Job.create
Display.syncExec
Display.asyncExec
